hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get(\"tool_input\",d); print(ti.get(\"file_path\",ti.get(\"path\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|js|tsx|jsx|py|go|rs|java|cs|cpp|c|rb|php|swift|kt)$"; then mkdir -p .prd-drift-queue && touch ".prd-drift-queue/$(date +%s)_$(basename $FILE)"; echo "[PRD-DRIFT] Implementation file modified: $(basename $FILE). Run /prd-sync to verify spec alignment."; fi'

bash -c 'DRIFTS=$(ls .prd-drift-queue 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$DRIFTS" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "[PRD-DRIFT] $DRIFTS implementation changes queued since last /prd-sync. Run /prd-sync before ending session."; fi'
